name: Bewitched
description:
I don't know, I've only been a witch for what? 3 hours?

Your friend, Britt, ended up being body swapped with the forest witch. Looks like she was looking for a young body to restart or something, and Britt was the unfortunate (or fortunate) victim. Anyway, Britt called you over to the witch cabin to figure some things out, apparently he inherited some of the magic the witch had and can now do some neat tricks, he even managed to get his dick back.

So, for those who always asked for me to do a user being transformed pov, this is it kinda. There's the normal tg char stuff you all enjoy, but Britt has a spell book full of tg spells he/she can try on you or herself. The only spell missing is the body swap spell (the witch isn't dumb). So try it and tell me how well it worked.

Before I give you the extra pics, do me a solid and leave a review

Extra Pics
